title: Rise of the Earth Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A boy named Drake is pulled from the castle kitchen to become a Dragon Master — and meets a rumbling earth dragon! 🌍

title: Saving the Sun Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: Drake races to save a sick Sun Dragon before the kingdom loses its light! ☀️

title: Secret of the Water Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: Bo's family is in danger—can the Dragon Masters protect the Dragon Stone? 💧

title: Power of the Fire Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: Left behind to guard the castle, Drake and Rori face Maldred's four-headed dragon! 🔥

title: Song of the Poison Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: Petra must bond with a poison-breathing hydra to save the king! 🐍

title: Flight of the Moon Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: The Dragon Masters race to save the dying prime Dragon Stone — and a surprise hatches! 🌙

title: Search for the Lightning Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A wild baby Lightning Dragon is on the loose, and a new Dragon Master must step up! ⚡

title: Roar of the Thunder Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A runaway Dragon Master and a roaring Thunder Dragon shake up the kingdom! 🌩️

title: Chill of the Ice Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: An Ice Giant freezes a faraway kingdom — only a Fire Dragon can save the day! ❄️

title: Waking the Rainbow Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A rainbow dragon's colors hold the key to a surprising mystery! 🌈

title: Shine of the Silver Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A silver dragon's shine hides a secret that could save the world! 🥈

title: Treasure of the Gold Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A shape-shifting gold dragon guards a treasure no thief can keep! 💰

title: Eye of the Earthquake Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: An earthquake dragon awakens — can the Dragon Masters keep the world from shaking apart? 🌋

title: The Land of the Spring Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A hidden land of seasons needs the Dragon Masters' help! 🌸

title: Future of the Time Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: Drake races through time to save a friend before it's too late! ⏳

title: Call of the Sound Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A sound no one can ignore calls the Dragon Masters to Remus! 🔔

title: Fortress of the Stone Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: An evil wizard's army of bones threatens the stone fortress! 🪨

title: Heat of the Lava Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A bubbling lava dragon leads the Dragon Masters underground! 🌋

title: Wave of the Sea Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A roaring sea dragon raises a giant wave to save the day! 🌊

title: Howl of the Wind Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A howling wind dragon breaks free to finish the quest! 💨

title: Bloom of the Flower Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A tiny Flower Dragon needs help to save his tribe from a terrible werewolf! 🌼

title: Guarding the Invisible Dragons
author: Tracey West
desc: A nest of invisible baby dragons needs magical fruit from a dangerous island before their powers fade! 👻

title: Curse of the Shadow Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A cursed Shadow Dragon is blanketing the sky — can the Dragon Masters find a way to stop him? 🌑

title: Dawn of the Light Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: The Dragon Masters need a shining Light Dragon to help summon a star and save the world! 💡

title: Legend of the Star Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: It's time to play the Star Flute and summon a legendary dragon to banish the sky-shadow! ⭐

title: Cave of the Crystal Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A sparkling crystal dragon hides a secret in its cave! 💎

title: Haunting of the Ghost Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: Drake and Bo face a haunted castle and a ghostly dragon! 👻

title: Night of the Dream Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: Drake chases Zoltan through a world of dreams! 💤
